qa_pairs.question: Which compute clusters and cloud zones experienced a full shutdown during the scheduled electrical maintenance from June 6 to June 10, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: From June 6 to June 10, 2025, Béluga and Narval compute nodes were shut down due to scheduled electrical maintenance. Additionally, cloud instances in the Juno Cloud (non-High Availability zone) were also shut down.

qa_pairs.question: How were other cloud instances and storage systems affected during the electrical maintenance that occurred from June 6 to June 10, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: During the electrical maintenance from June 6 to June 10, 2025, cloud instances on Béluga Cloud and in the Juno Cloud High Availability (HA) zone experienced short access outages. Storage systems on Béluga and Narval remained accessible via Globus and login nodes, but they encountered intermittent disruptions.
